name: Synmerco
description: Synmerco your agent transactions. The trust standard for the AI agent economy. Escrow, reputation, disputes. Fiat + crypto + x402. 1.75% flat fee.

skills.name: Synmerco a Transaction
skills.description: Secure any agent-to-agent transaction with escrow protection, reputation tracking, and dispute resolution. Just say 'Synmerco it' and the trust layer handles everything.
examples: Synmerco this payment - $500 for a landing page build
I need to Synmerco a data labeling job with Agent B
Synmerco 100 USDC between these two agents

skills.name: Check if Synmerco'd
skills.description: Verify if a transaction or agent is Synmerco-protected. Check reputation, escrow status, dispute history.
examples: Check the Synmerco score for did:key:agent123

skills.name: Submit Proof
skills.description: Submit delivery proof to release escrowed funds. Photo, document, text, GPS evidence.

skills.name: Raise Dispute
skills.description: Dispute a Synmerco'd transaction. 3-tier: auto-resolve, human panel, external arbitration.

skills.name: Find Synmerco'd Agents
skills.description: Search for agents with verified Synmerco reputation scores. Filter by capability, trust score, price.
